# User:  I'm looking for a restaurant in the west part of Cambridge that serves Austrian food and is budget-friendly. Do you have any recommendations?
# System: "I couldn't find any budget-friendly Austrian restaurants in the west part of Cambridge. Would you like me to search in a different area or consider other price ranges?"
# User:  Since there are no cheap Austrian restaurants in the west area, could you please check if there are any affordable Vietnamese restaurants in that part of Cambridge?
# System: "I found a budget-friendly Vietnamese restaurant in the west part of Cambridge called 'thanh binh'. They serve a variety of Vietnamese dishes and also offer an assortment of tea and coffees. Would you like me to help you make a reservation there?"
# User:  Yes, please book a table for 7 people at Thanh Binh on Thursday at 12:45. Also, could you arrange for a special birthday cake for the group?
# System: "Your table for 7 people at Thanh Binh has been successfully booked for Thursday at 12:45. For arranging the special birthday cake, I recommend contacting the restaurant directly to make sure they can accommodate your request. Is there anything else I can assist you with?"
# User:  Thanks for the booking! Now, I also need a train from Cambridge to Ely on Friday. The train should arrive by 18:45 and depart from Cambridge. Can you find options for me?
# System: "I found several train options from Cambridge to Ely on Friday that arrive before 18:45. The latest train leaves Cambridge at 17:50 and arrives in Ely at 18:07. Would you like me to book this train or another option for you?"
# User:  Please go ahead and book the 17:50 train from Cambridge to Ely for the same group of 7 people. Also, I would prefer first-class accommodation if available.
# System: "The train has been successfully booked for 7 people on the 17:50 train from Cambridge to Ely on Friday. Please note that I couldn't specify first-class accommodation during booking. Is there anything else I can assist you with?"
